title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hitachi India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hitachi India
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!
